center.name: 乔尔·阿萨夫·艾伦
center.summary: 乔尔·阿萨夫·艾伦是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Puna ibis、Yungas manakin、Black-and-white antbird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-and-white antbird (Myrmochanes hemileucus) is a species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, and Peru.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2025 |title=Plegadis ridgwayi |volume=2025 |article-number=e.T22697429A154879094 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2025-2.RLTS.T22697429A154879094.en |language=en |access-date=28 March 2026}} | taxon = Plegadis ridgwayi | authority = (Allen, 1876) | synonyms = * Falcinelus ridgwayi Allen, 1876 | range_map = Plegadis ridgwayi map.svg }} The puna ibis (Plegadis ridgwayi) is a species of waterbird in the family Threskiornithidae, spoonbills and ibises. It can be found in Ecuador, Argentina, Bolivia, Chile, and Peru. It can be found in the altiplano and puna regions of the Andean highlands, inhabiting wetlands such as swamps, marshes and lakes, at an elevation of . They migrate down to sea level to forage in coastal wetlands as well

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Yungas manakin (Chiroxiphia boliviana) is a species of bird in the family Pipridae. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, and Peru.Remsen, J

It can be found in the altiplano and puna regions of the Andean highlands, inhabiting wetlands such as swamps, marshes and lakes, at an elevation of .
